name: Alabama Licensing Board for General Contractors License Roster

agency.name: Alabama Licensing Board for General Contractors

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official license roster before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Alabama general contractor license records exposed by the official license roster
knownExclusions: Residential home builder licensing is handled by the Alabama Home Builders Licensure Board and is outside this source entry.
Specialty trade boards, local permits, business registrations, and non-board authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Any future access should respect lookup controls and prefer official bulk options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Alabama general contractor roster lookup. Future work should add separate entries for residential home builders and specialty trade boards if researched.
maintainerNotes: Keep the general-contractor-board scope explicit; do not imply all Alabama construction or trade authorizations are covered.
